name: Open Canvas
tagline: Full component vocabulary. No fixed structure. Compose freely.
best_for: lessons that do not fit any standard template pattern
experienced teachers who want full control over structure
revision sheets, mixed-format lessons, or unusual combinations
not_ideal_for: first-time users — start with a structured template
lessons where a defined pedagogical arc is important
layout_notes: Single column. Render components in plan order.
print_rules: Expand all collapsible content. Render write-in lines for student inputs.
why_this_template_exists: No set of fixed templates covers every lesson. Open Canvas ensures the system never forces a bad fit and gives experienced teachers a structured way to compose freely.

generation_guidance.tone: match the teacher's stated intent and audience
generation_guidance.pacing: determined by the section plan, not a fixed arc
generation_guidance.chunking: follow the component sequence in the plan
generation_guidance.emphasis: fill each component well — do not invent structure beyond what the plan selected
avoid: adding components not in the section plan
imposing a pedagogical arc that was not planned
